channel.title: DevOps on CoderPush
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on CoderPush

item.title: Hiring DevOps Engineers
item.description: Number of Available Positions: 2/3 (Updated on 2021 Apr 30th) We’re looking for a DevOps engineer to help us with the exciting DevOpsSec challenges. As a member of the CoderPush Saigon team, you can sit in our office in Binh Thanh district and help shape a remote-first workplace with full-timers and part-timers from Saigon, Hanoi, and the US. Who we are CoderPush is a studio of engineers and designers to collaborate with clients for great software, teams, and processes.
